name: Ep6: Share this Dance? - Villain of the Smiling Critters
description:
Villain of the Smiling Critters - Episode: Share this Dance?

Stars shining bright above you,

night breezes seem to whisper, "I love you".

Birds singing in the sycamore tree,

"Dream a little dream of me".

Update- Little tweaks and edits and fixes:
"Mother personality updated, Critters or others wont just know already you in on a heist with mother "mainly Raven", spelling fixes, Line "Song has ended..." was added to keep bobby from still singing the same song"

-
[Long Intro warning, Trying to keep the pacing good but the intro not too long, enjoy the lore, Hehe]

[Hope you enjoy this, I almost keep hitting writing blocks when writing this lol]
-

[Please comment under the "Story Choices" after chatting with the bot!]

Ep5: Smile Darling...
